div.head: The Combined Chiefs of Staff to the Commander in Chief, Allied Force Headquarters (Eisenhower)

opener.seg:
Fan 282Circulated as C. C. S. 413/2.
secret
priority

div.p: With reference to letter from GiraudSee Eisenhower’s memorandum of November 26, 1943, ante, p. 431. suggesting he attend Sextant, you should reply on following lines:

General Giraud’s offer to come to Cairo very much appreciated by Combined Chiefs of Staff, who feel, however, that it is unnecessary to ask the General to undertake the journey, since discussions on global strategy are of the broadest possible nature and the details of operations in France are not under consideration. Please inform him that the Combined Chiefs of Staff believe that your presentation here included an accurate and sympathetic explanation of his views.
The Combined Chiefs of Staff have the interest of France and of the French Armed Forces much at heart.
